commands.review_summary:
Adds configuredModel, selectedModel, and modelSelectionReason to the status summary redaction test session fixture.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the redaction fixture rows are assigned through StatusSummary while missing the now-required SessionStatus model-selection fields, matching the TS2739 errors quoted in the PR body.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the existing PR is the focused fix and is ready for normal maintainer review.

target.title: fix(status): update redaction fixture model fields
target.body:
main check-test-types is failing after #84612, which blocks downstream PRs from passing `pnpm check:changed`.

## Context

PR #84612 (`a13468320c`, `fix: clarify pinned session model status`) added `configuredModel`, `selectedModel`, and `modelSelectionReason` to `SessionStatus`.

`src/commands/status.summary.redaction.test.ts` still had a local `SessionStatus` fixture without those fields, so `check-test-types` fails on current `main`.

## Scope

- Fixture-only update in `src/commands/status.summary.redaction.test.ts`.
- Adds `configuredModel`, `selectedModel`, and `modelSelectionReason` to the shared redaction-test session fixture.
- Does not change the `SessionStatus` type or status behavior.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed**: `src/commands/status.summary.redaction.test.ts` no longer blocks current `main` test typechecking after #84612 added the pinned-model fields to `SessionStatus`.
- **Real environment tested**: Local OpenClaw checkout on the Linux executor, branch `wolf/status-summary-fixture-pinned-model-fields`, head `3ad5031262ae9a5cc6d546a6a2a9278e03238637`.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:

```text
node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo
pnpm check:changed --base origin/main
git diff --check origin/main..HEAD
gitleaks protect --staged --redact
```

- **Evidence after fix**: Terminal transcript from the local executor:

```text
$ node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo
(exit 0)

$ pnpm check:changed --base origin/main
[check:changed] lanes=coreTests
[check:changed] src/commands/status.summary.redaction.test.ts: core test

[check:changed] conflict markers
$ node scripts/check-no-conflict-markers.mjs

[check:changed] changelog attributions
$ node scripts/check-changelog-attributions.mjs

[check:changed] guarded extension wildcard re-exports
$ node scripts/check-extension-wildcard-reexports.mjs
No guarded extension wildcard re-exports found.

[check:changed] plugin-sdk wildcard re-exports
$ node scripts/check-plugin-sdk-wildcard-reexports.mjs
No plugin-sdk wildcard re-exports found in extension API barrels.

[check:changed] duplicate scan target coverage
$ node scripts/check-duplicates.mjs --coverage
[dup:check] target coverage ok

[check:changed] dependency pin guard
$ node scripts/check-dependency-pins.mjs
PASS direct dependency pin guard: checked 433 directly declared dependency specs across 131 tracked package manifests; 0 violations.

[check:changed] package patch guard
$ node scripts/check-package-patches.mjs
PASS package patch guard: no new pnpm patches; 2 legacy patches allowlisted.

[check:changed] typecheck core tests
$ node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo

[check:changed] lint core
$ node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src ui packages
[plugin-sdk boundary dts] fresh; skipping
[plugin-sdk package boundary dts] fresh; skipping
[qa-channel boundary dts] fresh; skipping
[discord boundary dts] fresh; skipping
[slack boundary dts] fresh; skipping
[whatsapp boundary dts] fresh; skipping
[plugin-sdk boundary root shims] fresh; skipping
Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.
Finished in 43.7s on 8666 files with 217 rules using 1 threads.

$ git diff --check origin/main..HEAD
(no output)

$ gitleaks protect --staged --redact
no leaks found
```

- **Observed result after fix**: The same core test typecheck command that failed on `status.summary.redaction.test.ts` exits 0, and `pnpm check:changed --base origin/main` reaches lint with `Found 0 warnings and 0 errors`.
- **What was not tested**: I did not run this change against other currently red downstream PRs.

Before evidence:

```text
$ node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo
src/commands/status.summary.redaction.test.ts(70,18): error TS2739: Type '{ key: string; kind: "direct"; sessionId: string; updatedAt: number; age: number; totalTokens: number; totalTokensFresh: boolean; remainingTokens: number; percentUsed: number; model: string; contextTokens: number; flags: string[]; }' is missing the following properties from type 'SessionStatus': configuredModel, selectedModel, modelSelectionReason
src/commands/status.summary.redaction.test.ts(76,22): error TS2739: Type '{ key: string; kind: "direct"; sessionId: string; updatedAt: number; age: number; totalTokens: number; totalTokensFresh: boolean; remainingTokens: number; percentUsed: number; model: string; contextTokens: number; flags: string[]; }' is missing the following properties from type 'SessionStatus': configuredModel, selectedModel, modelSelectionReason
```

## Open PR coverage check

These searches were run immediately before push; all returned `[]`:

```text
gh search prs --repo openclaw/openclaw --state open "Fixes #84612"
gh search prs --repo openclaw/openclaw --state open "status.summary.redaction"
gh search prs --repo openclaw/openclaw --state open "configuredModel selectedModel modelSelectionReason"
gh search prs --repo openclaw/openclaw --state open "SessionStatus configuredModel fixture"
gh search prs --repo openclaw/openclaw --state open "status.summary.redaction.test fixture"
```
